message:
Fix CI validation for dynamically synced docs skill

Remove .gitkeep from plugins/tenzir/skills/docs/ which was causing
validation failures due to missing SKILL.md (the file is generated at
runtime by sync-docs-skill.sh). Also update the validate workflow to
strip the hooks: block from skill frontmatter, as hooks is a Claude Code
extension not recognized by the skills-ref validator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -50,6 +50,8 @@ jobs:
               tmp_dir="$tmp_parent/$skill_name"
               cp -r "$skill_dir" "$tmp_dir"
               sed -i '/^disable-model-invocation:/d; /^argument-hint:/d' "$tmp_dir/SKILL.md"
+              # Strip multi-line hooks: block (Claude Code extension)
+              awk '/^hooks:/{skip=1; next} /^[^ ]/{skip=0} skip==0' "$tmp_dir/SKILL.md" > "$tmp_dir/SKILL.md.tmp" && mv "$tmp_dir/SKILL.md.tmp" "$tmp_dir/SKILL.md"
               if ! skills-ref validate "$tmp_dir"; then
                 errors=$((errors + 1))
               fi

@@ -1,3 +1,2 @@
-# Dynamically synced docs skill content
-skills/docs/*
-!skills/docs/.gitkeep
+# Dynamically synced docs skill content (created by sync-docs-skill.sh)
+skills/docs/

@@ -53,8 +53,8 @@ sync_skill() {
     return 1
   fi
 
-  # Clear old content (preserve .gitkeep)
-  find "$SKILL_DIR" -mindepth 1 -not -name '.gitkeep' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
+  # Clear old content
+  find "$SKILL_DIR" -mindepth 1 -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
 
   # Extract new content
   tar -xzf "$temp_dir/skill.tar.gz" -C "$SKILL_DIR"

@@ -1,5 +0,0 @@
-# This directory is dynamically populated by sync-docs-skill.sh
-# The SKILL.md and documentation content are downloaded from:
-# https://github.com/tenzir/docs/releases/tag/latest
-#
-# Do not manually edit files in this directory - they will be overwritten.
